channel.title: NearNow Mobile Local News
channel.description: Mobile and Baldwin County local headlines sourced from AL.com Mobile and AL.com for NearNow readers.

item.title: Mobile local news from AL.com
item.description: Follow Mobile, Alabama local news and Gulf Coast updates from AL.com through NearNow.

item.title: Mobile-area fallback headlines from AL.com
item.description: NearNow uses AL.com general RSS as a fallback source for Mobile, Baldwin County, Gulf Shores, Orange Beach, Daphne, Fairhope, Saraland, Prichard, and nearby terms.
